title: Title
description: The #[Title] attribute sets the page title for full-page Livewire components.

sections.title: #Basic usage
sections.content:
Apply the #[Title] attribute to a full-page component to set its title:
The browser tab will display "Create Post" as the page title.

examples.code: Create a New Post

sections.title: #Layout configuration
sections.content:
For the #[Title] attribute to work, your layout file must include a $title variable:
The ?? 'My App' provides a fallback title if none is specified.

sections.title: #Dynamic titles
sections.content:
For dynamic titles using component properties, use the title() method in the render() method:
The title will dynamically include the post's title.

examples.code:
post = Post::findOrFail($id); }  public function render() { return $this->view() ->title("Edit: {$this->post->title}"); }};?> 

Edit Post

sections.title: #Combining with layouts
sections.content:
You can use both #[Title] and #[Layout] together:
This component will use the admin layout with "Create Post" as the title.

examples.code: <?php // resources/views/pages/posts/⚡create.blade.php use Livewire\Attributes\Layout;use Livewire\Attributes\Title;use Livewire\Component; new#[Layout('layouts.admin')]#[Title('Create Post')]class extends Component { // ...};

sections.title: #When to use
sections.content:
Use #[Title] when:
Use title() method when:

sections.title: #Example: CRUD pages
sections.content:
Here's a complete example showing titles across CRUD operations:
Each page has a contextually appropriate title that improves user experience and SEO.

examples.code: <?php // resources/views/pages/posts/⚡index.blade.php use Livewire\Attributes\Title;use Livewire\Component; new #[Title('All Posts')] class extends Component { };
<?php // resources/views/pages/posts/⚡create.blade.php use Livewire\Attributes\Title;use Livewire\Component; new #[Title('Create Post')] class extends Component { };

<?php // resources/views/pages/posts/⚡edit.blade.php use Livewire\Component;use App\Models\Post; new class extends Component { public Post $post;  public function render() { return $this->view()->title("Edit: {$this->post->title}"); }};

<?php // resources/views/pages/posts/⚡show.blade.php use Livewire\Component;use App\Models\Post; new class extends Component { public Post $post;  public function render() { return $this->view()->title($this->post->title); }};

sections.title: #SEO considerations
sections.content: Good page titles are crucial for SEO:

sections.title: #Only for full-page components
sections.content: The #[Title] attribute only works for full-page components accessed via routes. Regular components rendered within other views don't use titles—they inherit the parent page's title.

sections.title: #Learn more
sections.content: For more information about full-page components, layouts, and routing, see the Pages documentation.
